languages.text: "Лорд-капитан". {n}Вигдис странно чеканит каждое слово.{/n} "Мастер дисциплины докладывает о попытке вооруженной диверсии в Секторе Бионика. Нарушитель использовал фраг-заряд, множество раненых среди персонала. Требуется присутствие Лорд-капитана".

traits.locale_text: "Лорд-капитан". {n}Вигдис безжизненно чеканит каждое слово, что немедленно вас настораживает.{/n} "Мастер дисциплины докладывает о попытке вооружённой диверсии в Секторе Бионика. Нарушитель использовал фраг-заряд, множество раненых среди персонала. Боюсь, без Вашей Светлости там не обойтись".

languages.text: "Lord Captain," {n}Vigdis says, her words oddly clipped.{/n} "The Master-at-Arms has reported an attempted armed sabotage in the Sector Bionica. The culprit used a frag grenade. There are many injured among the staff. The Lord Captain's presence is required."
languages.original_text: "Лорд-капитан". {n}Вигдис странно чеканит каждое слово.{/n} "Мастер дисциплины докладывает о попытке вооруженной диверсии в Секторе Бионика. Нарушитель использовал фраг-заряд, множество раненых среди персонала. Требуется присутствие Лорд-капитана".

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain," {n}Vigdis says, her words oddly clipped.{/n} "The Master-at-Arms has reported an attempted armed sabotage in the Sector Bionica. The culprit used a frag charge. There are many injured among the staff. The Lord Captain's presence is required."

"Lord Captain," {n}Vigdis says, her words oddly clipped.{/n} "The Master-at-Arms has reported an attempted armed sabotage in the Sector Bionica. The culprit used a frag charge. There are many injured among the staff. The Lord Captain's presence is required."

"Lord Captain," {n}Vigdis says, her words oddly clipped.{/n} "The Master-at-Arms has reported an attempted armed sabotage in the Sector Bionica. The culprit used a frag charge. There are many injured among the staff. The Lord Captain's presence is required."

languages.text: 「艦長様」ヴィグディスは、言葉が妙にぎこちなく言った。「武器を用いた破壊工作の試みがあったと、兵務長官から報告がありました。セクター・ビオニカで、爆弾が使用されました。多くの職員が負傷しています。艦長様の御臨席が必要です」
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain," {n}Vigdis says, her words oddly clipped.{/n} "The Master-at-Arms has reported an attempted armed sabotage in the Sector Bionica. The culprit used a frag charge. There are many injured among the staff. The Lord Captain's presence is required."

languages.text: "Lord Kaptan..." {n}Vigdis, tuhaf bir şekilde kesik kesik konuşuyor.{/n} "Silahtar, Sektör Biyonika'da silahlı bir sabotaj girişimi olduğunu bildirdi. Suçlu, parça tesirli bomba kullanmış. Personel arasında çok sayıda yaralı var. Lord Kaptan'ın huzuru gerekiyor."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain," {n}Vigdis says, her words oddly clipped.{/n} "The Master-at-Arms has reported an attempted armed sabotage in the Sector Bionica. The culprit used a frag grenade. There are many injured among the staff. The Lord Captain's presence is required."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Kaptan..." {n}Vigdis, tuhaf bir şekilde kesik kesik konuşuyor.{/n} "Silahtar, Sektör Biyonika'da silahlı bir sabotaj girişimi olduğunu bildirdi. Suçlu, parça tesirli bomba kullanmış. Personel arasında çok sayıda yaralı var. Lord Kaptan'ın huzuru gerekiyor."

languages.text: “舰长大人，”{n}维格迪斯言辞生硬异常。{/n}“戒律大师上报：仿生区发生一起武装破坏未遂事件。肇事者使用了破片手雷。多名人员受伤，需要您亲自到场处置。”
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain," {n}Vigdis says, her words oddly clipped.{/n} "The Master-at-Arms has reported an attempted armed sabotage in the Sector Bionica. The culprit used a frag grenade. There are many injured among the staff. The Lord Captain's presence is required."

traits.locale_text: “舰长大人，”{n}维格迪斯言辞生硬异常。{/n}“戒律大师上报：仿生区发生一起武装破坏未遂事件。肇事者使用了破片手雷。多名人员受伤，需要您亲自到场处置。”

languages.text: "Lord Captain", {n}sagt Vigdis seltsam abgehackt.{/n} "Die Waffenmeisterin hat eine versuchte bewaffnete Sabotage im Sektor Bionica gemeldet. Der Schuldige hat eine Splittergranate benutzt. Zahlreiche Mitarbeiter wurden verletzt. Die Anwesenheit des Lord Captains ist erforderlich."
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain," {n}Vigdis says, her words oddly clipped.{/n} "The Master-at-Arms has reported an attempted armed sabotage in the Sector Bionica. The culprit used a frag grenade. There are many injured among the staff. The Lord Captain's presence is required."

traits.locale_text: "Lord Captain", {n}sagt Vigdis seltsam abgehackt.{/n} "Die Waffenmeisterin hat eine versuchte bewaffnete Sabotage im Sektor Bionica gemeldet. Der Schuldige hat eine Splittergranate benutzt. Zahlreiche Mitarbeiter wurden verletzt. Die Anwesenheit des Lord Captains ist erforderlich."

languages.text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, {n}lâche Vigdis d'un ton étonnamment sec,{/n} la capitaine d'armes nous signale une tentative de sabotage armée dans le secteur Bionica. La coupable aurait utilisé une grenade à fragmentation. On déplore de nombreux blessés parmi les membres du personnel. Vous êtes {mf|attendu|attendue} sur les lieux dans les plus brefs délais. »
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain," {n}Vigdis says, her words oddly clipped.{/n} "The Master-at-Arms has reported an attempted armed sabotage in the Sector Bionica. The culprit used a frag grenade. There are many injured among the staff. The Lord Captain's presence is required."

traits.locale_text: « {mf|Seigneur-capitaine|Seigneure-capitaine}, {n}lâche Vigdis d'un ton étonnamment sec,{/n} la capitaine d'armes nous signale une tentative de sabotage armée dans le secteur Bionica. La coupable aurait utilisé une grenade à fragmentation. On déplore de nombreux blessés parmi les membres du personnel. Vous êtes {mf|attendu|attendue} sur les lieux dans les plus brefs délais. »

languages.text: «Lord Capitán», {n}dice Vigdis con todo curiosamente entrecortado.{/n} «La maestra de armas informa de un intento de sabotaje armado en el Sector Bionica. Quienquiera que haya sido, usó una granada frag. Hay muchos heridos entre el personal. Su presencia es necesaria».
languages.original_text: "Lord Captain," {n}Vigdis says, her words oddly clipped.{/n} "The Master-at-Arms has reported an attempted armed sabotage in the Sector Bionica. The culprit used a frag grenade. There are many injured among the staff. The Lord Captain's presence is required."

traits.locale_text: «Lord Capitán», {n}dice Vigdis con todo curiosamente entrecortado.{/n} «La maestra de armas informa de un intento de sabotaje armado en el Sector Bionica. Quienquiera que haya sido, usó una granada frag. Hay muchos heridos entre el personal. Su presencia es necesaria».
